description: This file defines a repository class 'TasksRepo' for managing task data in a database. It provides methods for creating, retrieving, updating, deleting, and listing tasks with various filters and sorting options.

classes.name: TasksRepo
classes.description: Repository class encapsulating database operations related to tasks, enabling creation, retrieval, update, deletion, and listing of tasks.

methods.name: __init__(self, conn)
methods.description: Constructor initializing the repository with a database connection.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] create( self, *, user_id: str, title: str, description: Optional[str], status: str, priority: str, due_date: Optional[date], )
methods.description: Creates a new task record in the database with provided details and returns the created task.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] get(self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str)
methods.description: Retrieves a specific task by user ID and task ID.

methods.name: bool delete(self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str)
methods.description: Deletes a task identified by user ID and task ID, returns whether the deletion was successful.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] update( self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str, fields: Dict[str, Any], )
methods.description: Updates specified fields of a task identified by user ID and task ID, returns the updated task.

methods.name: Tuple[List[Dict[str,Any]],int] list( self, *, user_id: str, q: Optional[str], status: Optional[str], priority: Optional[str], due_from: Optional[date], due_to: Optional[date], sort: str, order: str, limit: int, offset: int, )
methods.description: Lists tasks based on various filters like status, priority, due date range, and search query; supports sorting and pagination.

ctags.name: create
ctags.signature: ( self, *, user_id: str, title: str, description: Optional[str], status: str, priority: str, due_date: Optional[date], )

ctags.name: delete
ctags.pattern: /^    def delete(self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str) -> bool:$/

ctags.name: get
ctags.pattern: /^    def get(self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.signature: ( self, *, user_id: str, q: Optional[str], status: Optional[str], priority: Optional[str], due_from: Optional[date], due_to: Optional[date], sort: str, order: str, limit: int, offset: int, )

ctags.name: update
ctags.signature: ( self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str, fields: Dict[str, Any], )
